name: PCR Protocol
description: Polymerase chain reaction: thermostable-polymerase amplification of a target DNA sequence through repeated denaturation, primer annealing, and extension, with a gel size check before the product is accepted.
mermaid:
graph TD
    N1["Template DNA"]
    N2["Forward + reverse primers"]
    N3["dNTPs, Taq, Mg2+ buffer"]
    N4["Assemble mix on ice"]
    N5["Initial denaturation 95C"]
    N6["Denature 94C"]
    N7["Anneal primers ~55C"]
    N8["Extend at 72C (Taq)"]
    N9{"Cycles complete?"}
    N10["Final extension 72C"]
    N11{"Correct amplicon size?"}
    N12["Amplified target DNA"]

    N1 --> N4
    N2 --> N4
    N3 --> N4
    N4 --> N5
    N5 --> N6
    N6 --> N7
    N7 --> N8
    N8 --> N9
    N9 -->|no| N6
    N9 -->|yes| N10
    N10 --> N11
    N11 -->|optimize| N4
    N11 -->|yes| N12

    style N1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff
    style N2 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff
    style N3 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000
    style N4 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N5 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N6 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N7 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N8 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N9 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff
    style N10 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N11 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff
    style N12 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff

nodeDetails.label: Template DNA
nodeDetails.detail: Target DNA template containing the sequence to amplify

nodeDetails.label: Forward + reverse primers
nodeDetails.detail: Oligonucleotide primer pair flanking the target

nodeDetails.label: dNTPs, Taq, Mg2+ buffer
nodeDetails.detail: Reaction components: dNTPs, thermostable Taq polymerase, Mg2+ buffer

nodeDetails.label: Assemble mix on ice
nodeDetails.detail: Combine template, primers, and master mix on ice

nodeDetails.label: Initial denaturation 95C
nodeDetails.detail: Initial denaturation to separate template strands

nodeDetails.label: Anneal primers ~55C
nodeDetails.detail: Primers anneal to complementary sequences near the target Tm

nodeDetails.label: Final extension 72C
nodeDetails.detail: Final extension to complete partial products

nodeDetails.label: Correct amplicon size?
nodeDetails.detail: Agarose gel check: single band at expected size

flowchartStandard.name: source_grounded_extraction_v2
flowchartStandard.sourceGrounding: Nodes, decisions, branches, and loops were extracted from the cited sources; each node carries a sourceRef to its supporting citation. Awaiting human spot-check before verified=true.

notes: Source-grounded extraction (v2): node content derived from cited protocol literature with per-node provenance; topology reflects the actual procedure.

sources.title: Primer-directed enzymatic amplification of DNA with a thermostable DNA polymerase
sources.authors: Saiki, R. K.; Gelfand, D. H.; Stoffel, S.; Scharf, S. J.; Higuchi, R.; Horn, G. T.; Mullis, K. B.; Erlich, H. A.

sources.title: Specific synthesis of DNA in vitro via a polymerase-catalyzed chain reaction
sources.authors: Mullis, K. B.; Faloona, F. A.

sources.title: Molecular Cloning: A Laboratory Manual (3rd ed.)
